chk_orgs_approved_fields.name: chk_orgs_approved_fields
chk_orgs_approved_fields.value: "organizations"."verification_status" <> 'approved' or ("organizations"."reviewed_by" is not null and "organizations"."reviewed_at" is not null)

chk_orgs_rejected_fields.name: chk_orgs_rejected_fields
chk_orgs_rejected_fields.value: "organizations"."verification_status" <> 'rejected' or ("organizations"."rejection_reason" is not null and "organizations"."reviewed_by" is not null and "organizations"."reviewed_at" is not null)

chk_orgs_pending_fields.name: chk_orgs_pending_fields
chk_orgs_pending_fields.value: "organizations"."verification_status" <> 'pending' or ("organizations"."reviewed_by" is null and "organizations"."reviewed_at" is null and "organizations"."rejection_reason" is null)

uq_prizes_hackathon_rank.name: uq_prizes_hackathon_rank
uq_prizes_hackathon_rank.where: "hackathon_prizes"."bounty_id" is null and "hackathon_prizes"."rank" is not null

uq_prizes_bounty_rank.name: uq_prizes_bounty_rank
uq_prizes_bounty_rank.where: "hackathon_prizes"."bounty_id" is not null and "hackathon_prizes"."rank" is not null

uq_hackathon_results_bounty_rank.name: uq_hackathon_results_bounty_rank
uq_hackathon_results_bounty_rank.where: "hackathon_results"."bounty_id" is not null and "hackathon_results"."rank" is not null

chk_hackathons_physical_location.name: chk_hackathons_physical_location
chk_hackathons_physical_location.value: "hackathons"."type" = 'virtual' or ("hackathons"."location" is not null and "hackathons"."coordinates" is not null)

chk_team_members_exit_consistency.name: chk_team_members_exit_consistency
chk_team_members_exit_consistency.value: not ("team_members"."left_at" is not null and "team_members"."deleted_at" is not null)
